heading: Prerequisites
body:
- Ensure your Atlas user has the appropriate organization role:

  - To view Atlas Resource Policies, you must have at least [Organization Read Only](<Organization Read Only>) or
    [Organization Member](<Organization Member>) access to Atlas.

  - To create, update, or delete an Atlas Resource Policy, you must have [Organization Owner](<Organization Owner>)
    access to Atlas.

- To use the Atlas Administration API to create or manage Atlas Resource Policies, locate your public and private API (Application Programming Interface) keys so you can authenticate to the
  [Atlas Administration API](atlas-admin-api). To learn more, see [API Access Lists endpoint](atlas-admin-api-access).
